premise: A lighthouse keeper on Lake Superior has kept the light running for seven years after the collapse, believing ships still navigate by it. When a battered cargo vessel actually appears, its crew isn't looking for safe harbor — they're fleeing a plague ship behind them and need to make landfall before it catches up.

characters.name: Margit Salo
characters.description: Finnish-American lighthouse keeper, early 60s. Former Coast Guard. Meticulous, ritualistic, has structured her entire survival around the lighthouse routine. Talks to the lake like it's a person. Hasn't seen another human in two years.

characters.name: Dex Okafor
characters.description: Captain of the cargo vessel. Nigerian-Canadian, late 30s. Runs a trade loop between lakeside settlements. Pragmatic, exhausted, carrying guilt about a crew member they left on the plague ship.

characters.name: Vessel
characters.description: The plague ship's self-appointed quarantine officer. Former epidemiologist who decided containment means nobody leaves — ever. Broadcasts warnings that are half medical protocol, half manifesto. Never boards other ships; uses a small fast launch to disable rudders.
